title: Where does the .paqad/specs planning .yaml manifest go in the #343 cutover?
context: #343 A2 retires .paqad/specs. Four readers (manifest-parser, intelligence-assembler, plan-vs-actual, post-classifier) consume the <slug>.yaml PLANNING manifest (distinct from the frozen spec already repointed in A1). The issue says: fold into plan.json OR keep a slim manifest in a new home OR retire — 'the .paqad/specs path must have no reader left at the end.'

options.label: Relocate the yaml manifest to a new dedicated dir (.paqad/planning/manifests); readers keep their logic, only the path constant changes (low risk)
Fold the manifest fields into the feature bundle plan.json and repoint the 4 readers to bundle projections (matches the one-home vision; higher risk)
Retire the manifest readers entirely if vestigial

rationale: Lowest-risk cutover: readers keep their logic, only the path constant changes; satisfies 'no reader touches .paqad/specs' and removes PLANNING_SPECS_DIR without a risky data-model change to planning intelligence.
